Video.summary: Brad Starks' '32 Ford Coupe: a classic hot rod rebellion packing a supercharged LT4 with 680hp!
Video.title: Brad Starks - 1932 Coupe

Video.summary: We take a 1989 OBS Chevy C1500 truck and turn it into a time crunching beast on the track.
Video.title: Pro Touring Chevy

Video.summary: Our 1989 OBS Chevy C1500 truck gets a new heartbeat.
Video.title: Pro Touring Power

Video.summary: We work on the suspension of a 1989 OBS Chevy C1500 truck.
Video.title: Track Hugging Chevy

Video.summary: We take a 1989 OBS Chevy C1500 and fabricate truck bed to fit our new custom Oval track rear suspension.
Video.title: Pro Touring Paint

Video.summary: We add the final touches to our OBS Pro Touring Chevy C1500 and take it to the C10 Nationals.
Video.title: Pro Touring Chevy - Track Approved

Video.summary: Jeremy and Jimmy wear out a pair of tires testing their Trailblazer SS in a drift like fashion.
Video.title: Drifting Trailblazer

Video.summary: Dirt & Trails kicks off with a 1987 Land Cruiser and a 1994 F-150, affectionately named Project Leadfoot.
Video.title: Welcome to Dirt and Trails

Video.summary: Project Leadfoot gets a new roll cage, then upgrades to the lift, suspension, steering and brakes.
Video.title: Project Leadfoot Gets A Lift Kit

Image.alt: Project Leadfoot Gets A Lift Kit
Project Leadfoot Gets A Lift Kit
Project Leadfoot Gets A Lift Kit

Video.summary: Chris and Eric install a 600hp Ford 460 Big Block and Tremec TR4050 into Project Leadfoot.
Video.title: Project Leadfoot Gets a New Heart

Image.alt: Project Leadfoot Gets a New Heart
Project Leadfoot Gets a New Heart
Project Leadfoot Gets a New Heart

Video.summary: Eric and Chris overhaul Project Leadfoot's gauges, build transfer case bracing, and wire it up.
Video.title: Gauges, Wiring, and Welding Galore!

Video.summary: Eric measures Leadfoot's driveshafts; Chris preps the 600hp F-150 with new intake, exhaust, and fuel.
Video.title: Exhausting Exhaust Systems

Video.summary: Our '94 Ford F-150 Leadfoot goes from pickup to beast with crazy mods, a trail shakedown, and a Bigfoot cameo.
Video.title: Project Leadfoot is Complete

Video.summary: We're testing our new C-10 project, putting this old Chevy on a wild ride to plan our custom cruiser upgrades.
Video.title: Chevy C-10 - Part 1: Auto Cross Pretender

Image.alt: Chevy C-10 - Part 1: Auto Cross Pretender
Chevy C-10 - Part 1: Auto Cross Pretender
Chevy C-10 - Part 1: Auto Cross Pretender

Video.summary: We begin teardown of our Chevy C-10 and mockup the new suspension for better handling.
Video.title: Chevy C-10 - Part 2: Building the Foundation

Image.alt: Chevy C-10 - Part 2: Building the Foundation
Chevy C-10 - Part 2: Building the Foundation
Chevy C-10 - Part 2: Building the Foundation

Video.summary: We convert a long bed to short bed and install a rear step notch to drop our C-10
Video.title: Chevy C-10 - Part 3: Slice and Dice

Image.alt: Chevy C-10 - Part 3: Slice and Dice
Chevy C-10 - Part 3: Slice and Dice
Chevy C-10 - Part 3: Slice and Dice

Video.summary: We shorten Cream Puff's frame, show you our short bed options, and then start the new bed assembly.
Video.title: Chevy C-10 - Part 4: Making The Bed

Image.alt: Chevy C-10 - Part 4: Making The Bed
Chevy C-10 - Part 4: Making The Bed
Chevy C-10 - Part 4: Making The Bed

Video.summary: Watch the transformation as Tommy and Joel from Detroit Muscle roll an '83 Hurst Olds into the shop.
Video.title: Hurst Olds

Video.summary: It's BIGFOOT #1! The legendary truck that started the entire monster truck industry.
Video.title: Bigfoot

Video.summary: We put the last few pieces on our 1978 Datsun 280Z project, adding exhaust and fuel injection.
Video.title: Nissan 280Z Heritage Build Assembly and Payoff

Image.alt: Nissan 280Z Heritage Build Assembly and Payoff
Nissan 280Z Heritage Build Assembly and Payoff
Nissan 280Z Heritage Build Assembly and Payoff

Video.summary: Carcass gives you tips on how to repair rusty trouble spots and remove dents on your project.
Video.title: Abandoned Chevy Silverado Project Part 1: Rust and Dent Repair Tech

Image.alt: Abandoned Chevy Silverado Project Part 1: Rust and Dent Repair Tech
Abandoned Chevy Silverado Project Part 1: Rust and Dent Repair Tech
Abandoned Chevy Silverado Project Part 1: Rust and Dent Repair Tech

Video.summary: We head out to the junkyard to source a drivetrain for the 1996 Chevy Silverado.
Video.title: Abandoned Chevy Silverado Project Part 2: Junkyard Motor Refresh

Image.alt: Abandoned Chevy Silverado Project Part 2: Junkyard Motor Refresh
Abandoned Chevy Silverado Project Part 2: Junkyard Motor Refresh
Abandoned Chevy Silverado Project Part 2: Junkyard Motor Refresh

Video.summary: The Silverado gets buttoned up underneath the hood with cooling and power steering installations.
Video.title: Abandoned Chevy Silverado Part 3: Custom Exhaust

Image.alt: Abandoned Chevy Silverado Part 3: Custom Exhaust
Abandoned Chevy Silverado Part 3: Custom Exhaust
Abandoned Chevy Silverado Part 3: Custom Exhaust

Video.summary: Our '96 Chevy Silverado gets new body parts plus we’ll prep it for paint.
Video.title: Abandoned Chevy Silverado Project Part 4: On The Road Again

Image.alt: Abandoned Chevy Silverado Project Part 4: On The Road Again
Abandoned Chevy Silverado Project Part 4: On The Road Again
Abandoned Chevy Silverado Project Part 4: On The Road Again

Video.summary: The Abandoned Chevy Silverado project is back for mild performance upgrades to the engine.
Video.title: Abandoned Chevy Silverado Part 5: Increase Power

Image.alt: Abandoned Chevy Silverado Part 5: Increase Power
Abandoned Chevy Silverado Part 5: Increase Power
Abandoned Chevy Silverado Part 5: Increase Power

Video.summary: We take a 2008 Ford Crown Vic Police Cruiser and turn it into a budget-friendly Spec Panther racing
Video.title: Spec Panther Race Car Part 1: Transmission Upgrade

Image.alt: Spec Panther Race Car Part 1: Transmission Upgrade
Spec Panther Race Car Part 1: Transmission Upgrade
Spec Panther Race Car Part 1: Transmission Upgrade

Video.summary: We continue work on our Ford Crown Vic Police Cruiser Spec Panther race car.
Video.title: Spec Panther Race Car Part 2: Suspension Modification

Image.alt: Spec Panther Race Car Part 2: Suspension Modification
Spec Panther Race Car Part 2: Suspension Modification
Spec Panther Race Car Part 2: Suspension Modification

Video.summary: We finish work on our Ford Crown Vic Police Cruiser Spec Panther race car.
Video.title: Spec Panther Race Car Part 3: Paint & Payoff

Image.alt: Spec Panther Race Car Part 3: Paint & Payoff
Spec Panther Race Car Part 3: Paint & Payoff
Spec Panther Race Car Part 3: Paint & Payoff

Video.summary: Our ’55 Ford F100 pickup is a classic old school truck that needs some fresh attitude.
Video.title: F100 Basket Case

Video.summary: A good find: Marc and Tommy go on the hunt for a certain top-shelf Mopar.
Video.title: Hard Charger

Video.summary: The Detroit Muscle Dodge Charger needs some sheet metal replaced.
Video.title: Hard Charger: Heavy Metal

Video.summary: The Detroit Muscle Crew cuts a rusty old floor out of a '69 Dodge Charger and replace it.
Video.title: Hard Charger Floor and How to Pinstripe

Image.alt: Hard Charger Floor and How to Pinstripe
Hard Charger Floor and How to Pinstripe
Hard Charger Floor and How to Pinstripe

Video.summary: The time has come to paint Project Hard Charger.
Video.title: Hard Charger…or Midnight Rider?

Video.summary: Work continues on a 1969 Dodge Charger to adapt a Hellcat drivetrain to work in it; Tommy visits OPGI.
Video.title: Hard Charger – Hellcrate Install

Video.summary: Tommy puts the finishing touches on Project Hard Charger's hood.
Video.title: Charger Hood and Interior

Video.summary: We take Hard Charger to the Mopar Nationals in Ohio to give it a final shakedown.
Video.title: '69 Charger Hellcat Hits the Street

Video.summary: We head to Dallas for the Mecum Auction and run our Hellcat powered Charger across the block.
Video.title: '69 Charger Hellcat Goes to Mecum

Video.summary: Eric and Joel unearth the Cummins-crown-jewel dually diesel, a ’93 Dodge Ram W350.
Video.title: Diesel Diamond in the Rough

Video.summary: We yank out our old suspension, upgrade the underside of our Diesel Dually, and give new disc brakes.
Video.title: Lift & Shift

Video.summary: Our Dodge Dually, Project Nightshift, will shed its skin today as we buzz off all the imperfections.
Video.title: Prime Time Axle Folly

Video.summary: Get your brushes ready because our Dodge Diesel Dually, Nightshift, is turning to the dark side.
Video.title: One-ton, Two-tone Transformation

Video.summary: A new project is started: transforming a 1970 Camaro RS into a stock-style RS/SS 396.
Video.title: Project Limelight Debut

Video.summary: Learn how to fix old sheetmetal repairs and rust spots as Rick and Tommy work on the 1970 Camaro.
Video.title: 1970 Camaro Rust Repair and Engine Teardown

Image.alt: 1970 Camaro Rust Repair and Engine Teardown
1970 Camaro Rust Repair and Engine Teardown
1970 Camaro Rust Repair and Engine Teardown

Video.summary: Project Limelight turns green, how to paint stripes over clear, and how to refurbish stock wheels.
Video.title: Project Limelight Paint, Stripes and Wheels Refurb

Image.alt: Project Limelight Paint, Stripes and Wheels Refurb
Project Limelight Paint, Stripes and Wheels Refurb
Project Limelight Paint, Stripes and Wheels Refurb

Video.summary: Limelight gets some engine accessories. Learn how to paint and install a fiberglass hood.
Video.title: Project Limelight Engine Accessories & Hood Paint

Image.alt: Project Limelight Engine Accessories & Hood Paint
Project Limelight Engine Accessories & Hood Paint
Project Limelight Engine Accessories & Hood Paint

Video.summary: Project Limelight gets some finishing touches and the big block fires up.
Video.title: Project Limelight Payoff

Video.summary: This old Bronco is start of Project Crazy Horse and Stacey has got a mess on his hands.
Video.title: Crazy Horse Rust Replacement

Video.summary: We enhance Project Crazy Horse with new suspensions, wheels, and an upgraded axle.
Video.title: Crazy Horse Frame & Chassis

Video.summary: We install a new front axle and suspension on Project Crazy Horse, rejuvenating an old Ford Bronco.
Video.title: Crazy Horse Engine

Video.summary: We're revamping a 1966 Ford Bronco with a new engine and drive train, prepping it for the trails.
Video.title: Crazy Horse Drive Train

Video.summary: We delve into reconstructing our rusty '66 Ford Bronco amidst extensive repairs and modern upgrades.
Video.title: Crazy Horse Goes Under The Knife

Image.alt: Crazy Horse Goes Under The Knife
Crazy Horse Goes Under The Knife
Crazy Horse Goes Under The Knife

Video.summary: Project Crazy Horse, the ’66 bronco, is back from the paint shop and looking good.
Video.title: Crazy Horse Paint

Video.summary: Crazy Horse is going together fast with everything from seats, to roll bar, to fender flares.
Video.title: Crazy Horse Seats

Video.summary: The final touches are added to Project Crazy Horse: winch, bumpers, and lights.
Video.title: Crazy Horse Completion

Video.summary: Project Crazy Horse is let loose on the trails.
Video.title: Crazy Horse Special
